description: Machine-readable promotion thresholds for canonical pipeline mode advancement

off.description: Canonical pipeline output is ignored. Legacy scraper is sole authority.

shadow.description: Canonical pipeline loads and compares with legacy. Legacy remains authoritative. Comparison data is attached to API response for diagnostics.

internal_primary.description: Canonical values are served as primary for internal/dev evaluation only. Legacy values remain available as fallback. Not publicly visible.

public_primary.description: Canonical values are the public authority. Legacy scraper continues running as safety net / fallback.

metrics_definition.top50_overlap_pct: Percentage of canonical top-50 players that also appear in legacy top-50
metrics_definition.verdict_tier_agreement_pct: Percentage of matched players in same value tier (elite/star/starter/bench/depth)
metrics_definition.avg_abs_delta: Average absolute value difference between canonical and legacy for matched players (scale 0-9999)
metrics_definition.multi_source_blend_pct: Percentage of canonical assets that have 2+ source contributions
metrics_definition.source_count: Number of distinct sources contributing to canonical snapshot
metrics_definition.idp_source_count: Number of distinct sources in idp_vet universe
